'''Prid Shan''' served [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] as a [[Captain/Legends|Captain]], possibly [[Captain of the Guard/Legends|of the Senate Guard]]. His concerns over the Chancellor's life gave [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] the chance to create the [[Red Guard]].<ref name="Power Brokers" />
